item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Body Painted myself as Liara from Mass Effect - MCroft07
item.description: Painted myself as Liara from Mass Effect :) I haven't played it yet, I'm currently playing other games at the moment. But wanted to add it here for a timeline cleanse too. Thanks for all the nice comments, it's appreciated. Now for the big whammy faq Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I don’t recreate the reference photo like for like so I’ve put in a photo, but I prefer to change parts of the design to make it more “my version”. I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still here I’m currently drinking a yorkshire tea, and my bok choi that I'm growing outside is doing really well. I'm very excited it isn't dead yet! But a wild rabbit DID eat my sunflower (all 3 of them) I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. YoU'rE CamErA ShAkeS aRe WeIrD anD i DoN't LiKe It. I do not care, but cool, follow me on all my other socials and you'll see different videos then :) I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I do the vfx myself I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Gillibrand protest
item.description: $5,000-per-plate fundraiser for U.S. Senator Kirsten Gillibrand at a $3,000,000 McMansion in the Hamptons. Gillibrand voted YES on Trump's climate-wrecking budget. So no brunch for her! Gillibrand voted YES on Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy the guy actively killing clean vehicle standards and fighting NYC congestion pricing. You know, the policies that would actually reduce emissions in her own state. So no swirling white wine for her! Gillibrand voted YES on Interior Secretary Doug Burgum who's turning our public lands into fossil fuel feeding grounds. National parks? Nah. National drilling sites now, thanks to Kirsten! And Gillibrand falsely accused NYC mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani of making "references to global jihad" - because apparently smearing progressives with Islamophobia is easier than explaining why you're voting for climate arsonists. New York: This is your "climate champion" Democrat. The one who talks green at home then votes fossil fuel in DC. The one who'd rather cozy up to Trump than stand with people demanding a future.
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

Dollar Shave Club RUINED Internet Ads Forever: https://youtu.be/y5QhbRfy76o

item.title: 5 star service
item.description: Once during the pandemic I went to Little Caesars to grab a pizza. I think it was after the first vaccine had been out a bit, but people were still encouraged to social distance and wear masks. Anyways, I go in and there's some stoner standing at the front of the line (not wearing a mask) trying to decide what he wants. Finally he slowly asks if they have any cheesy bread sticks, and they tell him they don't have any ready and ask if he would like to order some. He declines and just keeps standing there, staring blankly ahead. The employee asks if there's something else they can help him with and he just asks if they have any cheesy bread sticks ready again. Rinse and repeat several times before the employees got fed up with him and kicked him out.
item.dc:creator: SquirrelWithATophat

item.title: Tesla’s business model is collapsing
item.description: It’s often overlooked that almost half of Tesla’s revenue comes from the sale of carbon credits. Since they only make electric vehicles, regular carmakers buy credits from Tesla in order to avoid paying fees to the gubmint. However, Trump’s big ugly bill removes the fines carmakers have to pay, which basically ends the carbon credit trade, which in turn ends a huge chunk of Tesla’s business model. Add that to collapsing sales, stalled development of new car models and rollout of autonomous taxis that promises to be downright catastrophic, and you have a bit of a problem. https://www.cnn.com/2025/07/22/business/tesla-regulatory-credit-sales-revenue?Date=20250722&Profile=cnn&utm_content=1753191494&utm_medium=social&utm_source=threads
item.dc:creator: Huor
